channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-02-23 22:34 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: This video is incredible. 60 Minutes goes to South Africa, clearly looking to debunk narratives abou...
item.description: This video is incredible. 60 Minutes goes to South Africa, clearly looking to debunk narratives about white farmers being targeted and killed with impunity, talk to farmers who have countless stories of their family and friends being tortured and killed with no arrests. Would this story even have aired before the Weiss era?

item.title: @elonmusk: "Elon was my Grok from the age he could read encyclopedias, as he remembered all the facts. Lucky me...
item.description: "Elon was my Grok from the age he could read encyclopedias, as he remembered all the facts. Lucky me." 一 Maye Musk

item.title: @elonmusk: "For 8 years, I was just trying to find purpose" Nolan has been paralyzed from the neck down for nea...
item.description: "For 8 years, I was just trying to find purpose" Nolan has been paralyzed from the neck down for nearly a decade Today - he's texting, working & destroying opponents in Mario Kart 🎮 Using ONLY his mind His words hit hard: "Anything anyone can do on a computer, I can do" That smile says it all Elon's Neuralink didn't just connect a human to a machine - It gave Nolan his life back ❤️

item.title: @elonmusk: This is diabolical Valdo Calocane was not sectioned following a violent psychotic attack because men...
item.description: This is diabolical Valdo Calocane was not sectioned following a violent psychotic attack because mental health workers had considered the “over representation of young black men in custody.” He went on to kill three people Decisions should NEVER be made on this basis

item.title: @elonmusk: ChatGPT & Gemini are straight-up HALLUCINATION MACHINES.
item.description: ChatGPT & Gemini are straight-up HALLUCINATION MACHINES.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX has officially completed the 1st Gen Direct-to-Cell constellation • 650+ satellites launched ...
item.description: SpaceX has officially completed the 1st Gen Direct-to-Cell constellation • 650+ satellites launched in 18 months • 12M+ people served with emergency connectivity • Live/Partnered in 8+ countries across 5 continents: 🇺🇸 USA (T-Mobile) 🇨🇦 Canada (Rogers) 🇦🇺 Australia (Optus/Telstra) 🇳🇿 NZ (One NZ) 🇯🇵 Japan (KDDI) 🇨🇭 Switzerland (Salt) 🇨🇱 Chile (Entel) 🇵🇪 Peru (Entel) Next wave for 2026: The UK (VMO2) and 14 African nations (Airtel) Starlink is the future of global connectivity

item.title: @elonmusk: They are reaching an ATH in hypocrisy
item.description: They are reaching an ATH in hypocrisy

item.title: @elonmusk: You need two pieces of ID to do a $19/hr job for Mamdani but no ID to vote for him. Let that sink in...
item.description: You need two pieces of ID to do a $19/hr job for Mamdani but no ID to vote for him. Let that sink in.

item.title: @elonmusk: A Restore Britain Government would hold a referendum on the death penalty. If the British people sup...
item.description: A Restore Britain Government would hold a referendum on the death penalty. If the British people support it, we would reintroduce the death penalty for cases of such brutal evil and undeniable guilt. Restore Britain would put the very worst rape gang savages to death.

item.title: @elonmusk: People giving OpenClaw root access to their entire life
item.description: People giving OpenClaw root access to their entire life

item.title: @elonmusk: “If you try to buy a gun, they’ll ID you six ways to Sunday.”@elonmuskon voter ID and fraud: “CA jus...
item.description: “If you try to buy a gun, they’ll ID you six ways to Sunday.”@elonmuskon voter ID and fraud: “CA just passed a law making it illegal to require voter ID in any election.” “They’re not even allowed to look at your ID.” “They’re proud of it— they’re not hiding it.” “It’s so fraud can never be proven. It enables large-scale fraud, and no way to prove it. How would you? It’s literally impossible— no ID. You’re not even allowed to show ID.” “They come up with some nice sounding this. Their rebuttal is, it’s racist to require ID. I think it’s racist and patronizing to say people can’t figure out how to get an ID.” “You need ID for everything. Except voting. It’s total bullshit, obviously Via@TuckerCarlson

item.title: @elonmusk: Anthropic is guilty of stealing training data at massive scale and has had to pay multi-billion doll...
item.description: Anthropic is guilty of stealing training data at massive scale and has had to pay multi-billion dollar settlements for their theft. This is just a fact.

item.title: @elonmusk: Most people have no idea that democracy would already be dead in America if not for the brave action...
item.description: Most people have no idea that democracy would already be dead in America if not for the brave actions of Senators Sinema and Manchin

item.title: @elonmusk: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering hum...
item.description: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering humanity Discovering all physics Inventing all useful technologies Consciousness to the stars Love
